headline: Built for Closify
subheadline: AI systems to streamline recruiting and managing commission-only sales reps for global expansion

challenges.title: Workforce Fluctuations
challenges.desc: Closify's team of 4 employees faces -7.7% yearly growth. This limits scaling during peak recruitment needs. Managing fluctuations across departments adds operational strain.

challenges.title: International Presence
challenges.desc: Closify operates in the United States, Netherlands, and Brazil. Coordinating a small team across these regions creates communication gaps. This hinders efficient partnership expansion.

challenges.title: Recruiting Sales Reps
challenges.desc: Closify focuses on hiring commission-only sales reps. The small team struggles to vet and onboard reps quickly. This delays business development efforts amid growth fluctuations.

challenges.title: Partnership Growth
challenges.desc: Closify prioritizes expanding partnerships as a business development manager. A -7.7% yearly employee decline makes maintaining these partnerships challenging. This impacts recruiting high-ticket reps effectively.

deliverables.title: AI Recruitment Engine
deliverables.desc: Builds an AI tool to automate sourcing and vetting of commission-only sales reps, integrating with Closify's platform for seamless hiring

deliverables.title: Global Management Dashboard
deliverables.desc: Creates a dashboard to monitor team performance across the US, Netherlands, and Brazil, integrating with existing tools for real-time insights

deliverables.title: Sales Rep Onboarding System
deliverables.desc: Develops an AI-driven system for quick onboarding of sales reps, linking to Closify's workflow to reduce fluctuations in workforce growth

deliverables.title: Partnership Analytics Tool
deliverables.desc: Constructs an analytics system to track and optimize partnerships, integrating data from LinkedIn and Closify's database for data-driven decisions

engagementSteps.title: Initial Assessment
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 1
engagementSteps.desc: Review Closify's current recruitment processes and identify key pain points based on their small team and growth data.

engagementSteps.title: System Development
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 2
engagementSteps.desc: Design and build the AI infrastructure tailored to Closify's needs for managing sales reps and international operations.

engagementSteps.title: Integration and Launch
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 3
engagementSteps.desc: Integrate the new systems with Closify's platform and launch for immediate use in expanding partnerships.

faqItems.question: What is AI-powered sales infrastructure?
faqItems.answer: It uses AI to automate recruiting, hiring, and managing sales reps for efficiency.

faqItems.question: How does it integrate with Closify?
faqItems.answer: The system links directly to Closify's platform for seamless data flow and operations.

faqItems.question: What are the costs involved?
faqItems.answer: Costs vary based on customization; we base it on Closify's team size and growth needs.

faqItems.question: How long does implementation take?
faqItems.answer: Typically 3 months, starting with assessment and ending with full integration.

faqItems.question: Is it scalable for small teams?
faqItems.answer: Yes, it's designed for teams like Closify's 4 employees to handle growth fluctuations.

faqItems.question: What data do you use?
faqItems.answer: We use real data like Closify's -7.7% yearly growth and LinkedIn follower metrics.

stackItems.name: LinkedIn API
stackItems.role: Handles follower tracking and recruitment sourcing

stackItems.name: Python
stackItems.role: Powers AI algorithms for data analysis and automation

stackItems.name: Salesforce
stackItems.role: Manages CRM integration for sales rep tracking

stackItems.name: Google Analytics
stackItems.role: Monitors user engagement and performance metrics

stackItems.name: AWS
stackItems.role: Provides cloud hosting for scalable infrastructure
